title: Modern Skin Packs
description: Post-legacy skin packs ported to Java!
body:
# Modern Skin Packs [](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/modern-skin-packs) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/modern-skin-packs) [](https://codeberg.org/Nostalgica-Reverie/Legacy-Skin-Packs) [](https://discord.com/invite/fG2WxHUGxx) Modern Skin Packs is a resource pack made for mods [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j) and [LegacySkins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins) that aims to recreate skins from New 3DS Edition and other Editions of Minecraft to Java. It is best used in conjunction with [Legacy Skin Packs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/legacy-skin-packs) for the full experience. ## Thanks to:
Credits **Pigzone00:** For creating & maintaining the organization and the resource pack. **Lyn:** For recreating Festive 2016 Mash-Up and other misc. fixes and packs. **PMO:** For recreating Beach Party, Builders & Biomes, Coral Crafters, Crafty Costumes, Dungeon Hero, Earth, and Fauna Friends packs.
